forbidden_actions: editing user-facing site surfaces for contribution-only work
deploying, pushing, or touching live state
reading or printing secrets from local environments

rules: preserve and tighten repo-specific doctrine instead of replacing it
prefer repo-owned guardrails for repeatable failures
keep contribution verification scoped to trusted repo-owned commands
treat verify as defense in depth, not as a sandbox

classification.one_off_judgment: editorial or product judgment that should stay in review unless explicitly promoted
classification.repeatable_defect: a recurring bug, missing guardrail, or flaky workflow that should become local infrastructure
classification.missing_domain_knowledge: important repo context is missing locally and should be added to doctrine or contract files
classification.agent_behavior_failure: an agent process failure such as skipped verification, unsafe commands, or ignored boundaries that should be hardened locally

escalate_if: existing instructions conflict materially and cannot be reconciled without changing site behavior
full verification requires installing dependencies or accessing secrets
any action would trigger a public deploy or touch live state

verification.honest_boundary: verify runs trusted repo-owned commands with bounded output and timeouts, but it is not a sandbox

commands.description: Type and content validation for the Astro project.
Production build of the public site.
Repo unit tests, including contribution-gate coverage.
Repo-local doctrine scan for forbidden public-surface strings.
Targeted public-surface browser checks for desktop and mobile.
